creator: sdalu@sdalu.com
text:
Created attachment 220680
set of package for new version of nanoc

New version of Nanoc is available.

The archive in attachement provides
* an upgrade for
www/rubygem-nanoc

* the necessary new ports
devel/rubygem-ddmemoize
devel/rubygem-ddmetrics
devel/rubygem-slow_enumerator_tools
devel/rubygem-json_schema
www/rubygem-nanoc-checking
www/rubygem-nanoc-cli
www/rubygem-nanoc-core
www/rubygem-nanoc-deploying
